availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Krueger's comments + add disclaimers: "Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.” + lin4=> <:ϣⲁ(?)|reg|ϣⲉ:>; the rest of the text is good to me.
Vote - AcceptText - lin1=> ⲥⲡⲟⲩ2.- {ⲩ}ⲇⲁⲍⲉ (add curly brackets) lin4=> ⲣ ⲡϣⲉ (add space)
Submit - Added text according to O.Crum 95. Think I got the Greek loan words. Added supralinear strokes in lins3-6 from the image. Please check everything carefully.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.

div.ab:
ⲁⲣⲓ ⲡⲛⲁ ⲛⲅσπουδάζεινⲥⲡⲟⲩ
ⲩⲇⲁⲍⲉ ⲁⲣⲏⲩ ⲧⲉⲧⲛ
ⲁϭⲛ τύποςⲧⲩⲡⲟⲥ ⲛⲧⲉⲧⲛ
ⲣ ⲡϣⲁϣⲉ ⲛⲟϭ ⲛϣⲧⲁ
ⲛⲧⲉⲧⲛⲁⲁϥ ⲙⲡⲣ
ϫⲉ ⲛⲧⲛϫⲟⲟⲩ
ⲛⲕⲁⲙⲁⲩⲗⲉ
ⲛⲥⲉ
